economic_notes: Gwawaenuk Tribe holds investments in Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber GP Ltd. and Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber Limited Partnership accounted for under modified equity method. Also holds cost-method investments in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP and related corporation. Significant economic dependence on Indigenous Services Canada funding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because the First Nation did not provide a completed capital asset register; tangible capital assets may be misstated. Accumulated surplus per Note 8 ($1,105,503) differs from the balance sheet figure ($1,046,781) — likely a rounding/presentation discrepancy in the statements. Two GBEs (Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber LP and Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber GP Ltd.) accounted for under modified equity method. Total government transfers include ISC ($228,729) and Province of BC ($5,000) and First Nations Health Authority ($75,000). Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 but auditor signed February 19, 2025 — a very unusual five-year delay in audit completion. expenses_infrastructure reflects Capital Projects amortization expense. expenses_enterprises reflects Economic Development and Maintenance total expenses.
